name: hermes
notes: Hermes is the first new runtime added under v1.2.0's supply-chain trust rails. Worker spawn passes through worker-env allowlist (default-deny AWS_*/OPENAI_*/etc.), secret-scan argv, tool allowlist, and strict-mode approval gating with zero special-case code.
v1_2_0_trust_rails: worker-env-allowlist: default-deny on AWS_*, OPENAI_*, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, etc.
secret-scan-argv: refuses argv elements matching known secret patterns before spawn.
strict-mode-approval: in strict governance, requires explicit operator approval before spawn.
